title: Setting Up a NOWPayments Digital Store: Everything You Need to Get Started
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: USDT, BTC, ETH, SOL, and 300+ coins. Get paid in seconds, convert locally, and keep 100% of your revenue minus network fees.

content.text: In Pakistan, digital creators like you face a constant struggle: getting paid. Despite your hard work and dedication, platforms like PayPal and Stripe continue to deny you access, citing 'geo-restrictions' or 'banking limitations.' The frustration is real: you're forced to wait for days, even weeks, for your payout. You can't rely on Gumroad's delayed payouts or worry about the high fees associated with traditional payment processors. It's time for a better solution.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

NOWPayments is the missing piece in your digital commerce puzzle. By integrating with our platform, you can accept over 300 cryptocurrencies, including USDT, and bypass the geo-restrictions that limit your access to traditional payment processors. Our system is designed to be fully automated, ensuring that you receive your payment instantly, without any delays or intermediaries. This means you can focus on what you do best: creating and selling digital products. No more waiting for days, no more high fees, no more frustration. With NOWPayments, you're in control.
What You Need Before You Start

Before you begin, make sure you have the following: a digital product to sell, a basic understanding of cryptocurrency and blockchain technology, and a NOWPayments account. You can sign up for a FREE account on our website. Additionally, consider investing in our Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) — a comprehensive package that includes everything you need to get started, including the NOWPayments Core Shop Engine and Admin Dashboard. Don't worry if you're new to crypto; we've got resources and support to help you every step of the way.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

To set up your payment and delivery pipeline, follow these steps: create a new product on your NOWPayments account, configure your payment and delivery settings, and connect your wallet. Next, integrate the NOWPayments Core Shop Engine with your website or platform. This will enable instant payment processing and automated delivery of your digital products. Make sure to test your setup thoroughly to ensure that everything is working as expected.
You can accept over 300 cryptocurrencies, including USDT, with NOWPayments.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once you've set up your payment and delivery pipeline, it's time to go live. Promote your digital product to your audience, share your sales page on social media, and start accepting payments. When a customer makes a purchase, NOWPayments will handle the payment processing and delivery of your digital product. You'll receive your payment instantly, and the customer will receive their product immediately. It's a seamless experience for everyone involved.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

As your digital commerce business grows, you can scale your operations with ease. With NOWPayments, you can easily integrate with popular platforms like Shopify or WooCommerce, and expand your product offerings to include physical goods. Our system is designed to handle high volumes of transactions, so you can focus on what really matters: growing your business and creating more value for your customers.
How do I receive crypto payments for my digital products?

USDT is the most practical starting point for digital product sales because it eliminates price volatility from the equation. Your buyer pays in USDT and you receive USDT — one dollar in equals one dollar received, minus Tron network fees of under one dollar per transaction. You do not need to manage exchange rate risk or time your conversions around market movements. When you are ready to convert to local currency, you use a P2P exchange — Binance P2P is available in most countries, and local exchanges exist in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, and Bangladesh with good liquidity. The conversion to naira, cedis, shillings, or rupees takes 20-30 minutes on average. This is a complete, operational path from digital product sale to local currency in your hands.
Gumroad's delayed payouts are a thing of the past when you use NOWPayments.
